#!/usr/bin/env bats

# Artifact cleanup script tests using bats framework
# Tests cover: parsing, retention policies, dry-run mode, summary generation

setup() {
  # Create a temporary directory for test data
  TEST_TMPDIR="$(mktemp -d)" || exit 1
  SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
  SCRIPT="${SCRIPT_DIR}/artifact-cleanup.sh"

  # Create mock artifact CSV file for testing
  MOCK_CSV="${TEST_TMPDIR}/artifacts.csv"
}

teardown() {
  # Clean up temporary test directory
  rm -rf "${TEST_TMPDIR}"
}

# Test 1: Script exists and is executable
@test "script exists and is executable" {
  [ -f "${SCRIPT}" ]
  [ -x "${SCRIPT}" ]
}

# Test 2: Script fails gracefully with no input
@test "script fails with missing input file" {
  run "${SCRIPT}" --input /nonexistent/file.csv --dry-run
  [ "$status" -ne 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"not found"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Error"* ]]
}

# Test 3: Parse simple artifact CSV with headers
@test "parses artifact CSV with correct format" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-2
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact-1"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact-2"* ]]
}

# Test 4: Dry-run mode does not actually delete
@test "dry-run mode reports what would be deleted" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,2000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"DRY RUN"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"dry-run"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"dry run"* ]]
}

# Test 5: Apply max-age retention policy
@test "deletes artifacts older than max-age" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
old-artifact,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
new-artifact,2000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"old-artifact"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
}

# Test 6: Apply max-total-size retention policy
@test "keeps only latest artifacts when total size exceeds limit" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,3000,2026-05-01,run-1
artifact-2,3000,2026-05-02,run-1
artifact-3,3000,2026-05-03,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-total-size 5000
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
}

# Test 7: Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
@test "keeps only latest N artifacts per workflow" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
artifact-2,1000,2026-05-02,run-1
artifact-3,1000,2026-05-03,run-1
artifact-4,1000,2026-05-04,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --keep-latest 2
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact-1"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"artifact-2"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
}

# Test 8: Summary includes total space reclaimed
@test "summary includes total space reclaimed" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,5000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,3000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"space"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Space"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"reclaimed"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"total"* ]]
}

# Test 9: Summary shows artifacts retained vs deleted
@test "summary shows count of artifacts retained and deleted" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,1000,2026-05-05,run-1
artifact-3,1000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"retain"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Retain"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"keep"* ]]
}

# Test 10: Multiple retention policies combine correctly (all must be satisfied)
@test "multiple policies are combined (AND logic)" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,1000,2026-04-25,run-1
artifact-3,1000,2026-05-04,run-1
artifact-4,1000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 10 --keep-latest 2
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact"* ]]
}

# Test 11: Help message
@test "displays help message with --help flag" {
  run "${SCRIPT}" --help
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"Usage"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"usage"* ]]
}

# Test 12: Handle empty CSV gracefully
@test "handles empty artifact list" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
}

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Arrays to track artifacts for deletion/retention
declare -a ARTIFACTS_TO_DELETE
declare -a ARTIFACTS_TO_RETAIN

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file into associative arrays
load_artifacts() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local line_num=0

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))

    # Skip header line
    if [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    # Store artifact data
    artifacts_ref["${name}|name"]="$name"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|size"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|date"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|run"]="$workflow_run_id"
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
apply_max_age() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ ! "$key" =~ \|date$ ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    local artifact_name="${key%|date}"
    local artifact_date="${artifacts_ref[$key]}"
    local age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$artifact_date")

    if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
      delete_ref+=("$artifact_name")
    fi
  done
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
apply_max_total_size() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  # Collect all artifacts with size and sort by date (oldest first)
  local -a temp_artifacts
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      temp_artifacts+=("${key%|name}")
    fi
  done

  # Sort by creation date (oldest to newest)
  local -a sorted_artifacts
  local -a artifact_data
  for artifact in "${temp_artifacts[@]}"; do
    artifact_data+=("${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|date]}:$artifact")
  done

  # Sort and extract artifact names
  local IFS=$'\n'
  sorted_artifacts=($(sort <<< "${artifact_data[*]}"))
  unset IFS

  # Calculate total size and mark for deletion if exceeds limit
  local total_size=0
  local marked_count=0
  for entry in "${sorted_artifacts[@]}"; do
    local artifact="${entry#*:}"
    local size="${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|size]}"
    total_size=$((total_size + size))

    if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      delete_ref+=("$artifact")
      (( marked_count++ ))
    fi
  done
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
apply_keep_latest() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  # Group artifacts by workflow_run_id
  declare -A workflow_artifacts
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|run$ ]]; then
      local artifact_name="${key%|run}"
      local workflow_id="${artifacts_ref[$key]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$workflow_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$workflow_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$workflow_id"]+="$artifact_name "
    fi
  done

  # For each workflow, keep only the N latest
  for workflow_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
    local artifacts_list="${workflow_artifacts[$workflow_id]}"

    # Sort by creation date (newest first)
    local -a artifact_array
    local -a sort_data
    for artifact in $artifacts_list; do
      local date="${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|date]}"
      sort_data+=("$date:$artifact")
    done

    local IFS=$'\n'
    artifact_array=($(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    # Mark older artifacts for deletion
    for (( i = KEEP_LATEST; i < ${#artifact_array[@]}; i++ )); do
      local entry="${artifact_array[$i]}"
      local artifact="${entry#*:}"
      delete_ref+=("$artifact")
    done
  done
}

# Consolidate deletion decisions and generate report
generate_plan() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -a all_deletions=()

  # Collect all artifacts marked for deletion
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ ! "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    local artifact_name="${key%|name}"
    # Check if should be deleted by any policy
    local should_delete=false

    if [[ ! -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
      local age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_ref[${artifact_name}|date]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        should_delete=true
      fi
    fi

    if [[ ! -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
      # Would need to recalculate here, simplified for now
      :
    fi

    if [[ ! -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
      # Simplified check
      :
    fi
  done
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts
  declare -A artifacts
  load_artifacts artifacts

  # Apply retention policies
  declare -a to_delete
  declare -a to_retain

  apply_max_age artifacts to_delete to_retain
  apply_max_total_size artifacts to_delete to_retain
  apply_keep_latest artifacts to_delete to_retain

  # Generate deletion plan and summary
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
  fi

  echo ""
  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  # Calculate summary statistics
  local total_artifacts=0
  local total_size=0
  declare -A processed_artifacts
  local deleted_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for key in "${!artifacts[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      (( total_artifacts++ ))
      local artifact="${key%|name}"
      total_size=$((total_size + artifacts[${artifact}|size]))
      processed_artifacts["$artifact"]=0
    fi
  done

  # Mark artifacts for deletion
  for artifact in "${to_delete[@]}"; do
    if [[ -n "$artifact" ]]; then
      processed_artifacts["$artifact"]=1
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts[${artifact}|size]))
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts[${artifact}|size]} bytes, date: ${artifacts[${artifact}|date]})"
    fi
  done

  # Report retained artifacts
  local retained_count=0
  for artifact in "${!processed_artifacts[@]}"; do
    if [[ "${processed_artifacts[$artifact]}" == "0" ]]; then
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts[${artifact}|size]} bytes, date: ${artifacts[${artifact}|date]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Arrays to track artifacts for deletion/retention
declare -a ARTIFACTS_TO_DELETE
declare -a ARTIFACTS_TO_RETAIN

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file into associative arrays
load_artifacts() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local line_num=0

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))

    # Skip header line
    if [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    # Store artifact data
    artifacts_ref["${name}|name"]="$name"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|size"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|date"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|run"]="$workflow_run_id"
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
apply_max_age() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ ! "$key" =~ \|date$ ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    local artifact_name="${key%|date}"
    local artifact_date="${artifacts_ref[$key]}"
    local age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$artifact_date")

    if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
      delete_ref+=("$artifact_name")
    fi
  done
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
apply_max_total_size() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  # Collect all artifacts with size and sort by date (oldest first)
  local -a temp_artifacts
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      temp_artifacts+=("${key%|name}")
    fi
  done

  # Sort by creation date (oldest to newest)
  local -a sorted_artifacts
  local -a artifact_data
  for artifact in "${temp_artifacts[@]}"; do
    artifact_data+=("${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|date]}:$artifact")
  done

  # Sort and extract artifact names
  local IFS=$'\n'
  sorted_artifacts=($(sort <<< "${artifact_data[*]}"))
  unset IFS

  # Calculate total size and mark for deletion if exceeds limit
  local total_size=0
  local marked_count=0
  for entry in "${sorted_artifacts[@]}"; do
    local artifact="${entry#*:}"
    local size="${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|size]}"
    total_size=$((total_size + size))

    if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      delete_ref+=("$artifact")
      (( marked_count++ ))
    fi
  done
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
apply_keep_latest() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  # Group artifacts by workflow_run_id
  declare -A workflow_artifacts
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|run$ ]]; then
      local artifact_name="${key%|run}"
      local workflow_id="${artifacts_ref[$key]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$workflow_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$workflow_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$workflow_id"]+="$artifact_name "
    fi
  done

  # For each workflow, keep only the N latest
  for workflow_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
    local artifacts_list="${workflow_artifacts[$workflow_id]}"

    # Sort by creation date (newest first)
    local -a artifact_array
    local -a sort_data
    for artifact in $artifacts_list; do
      local date="${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|date]}"
      sort_data+=("$date:$artifact")
    done

    local IFS=$'\n'
    artifact_array=($(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    # Mark older artifacts for deletion
    for (( i = KEEP_LATEST; i < ${#artifact_array[@]}; i++ )); do
      local entry="${artifact_array[$i]}"
      local artifact="${entry#*:}"
      delete_ref+=("$artifact")
    done
  done
}

# Consolidate deletion decisions and generate report
generate_plan() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -a all_deletions=()

  # Collect all artifacts marked for deletion
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ ! "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    local artifact_name="${key%|name}"
    # Check if should be deleted by any policy
    local should_delete=false

    if [[ ! -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
      local age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_ref[${artifact_name}|date]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        should_delete=true
      fi
    fi

    if [[ ! -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
      # Would need to recalculate here, simplified for now
      :
    fi

    if [[ ! -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
      # Simplified check
      :
    fi
  done
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts
  declare -A artifacts
  load_artifacts artifacts

  # Apply retention policies
  declare -a to_delete
  declare -a to_retain

  apply_max_age artifacts to_delete to_retain
  apply_max_total_size artifacts to_delete to_retain
  apply_keep_latest artifacts to_delete to_retain

  # Generate deletion plan and summary
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
  fi

  echo ""
  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  # Calculate summary statistics
  local total_artifacts=0
  local total_size=0
  declare -A processed_artifacts
  local deleted_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for key in "${!artifacts[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      (( total_artifacts++ ))
      local artifact="${key%|name}"
      total_size=$((total_size + artifacts[${artifact}|size]))
      processed_artifacts["$artifact"]=0
    fi
  done

  # Mark artifacts for deletion
  for artifact in "${to_delete[@]}"; do
    if [[ -n "$artifact" ]]; then
      processed_artifacts["$artifact"]=1
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts[${artifact}|size]))
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts[${artifact}|size]} bytes, date: ${artifacts[${artifact}|date]})"
    fi
  done

  # Report retained artifacts
  local retained_count=0
  for artifact in "${!processed_artifacts[@]}"; do
    if [[ "${processed_artifacts[$artifact]}" == "0" ]]; then
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts[${artifact}|size]} bytes, date: ${artifacts[${artifact}|date]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

#!/usr/bin/env bats

# Artifact cleanup script tests using bats framework
# Tests cover: parsing, retention policies, dry-run mode, summary generation

setup() {
  # Create a temporary directory for test data
  TEST_TMPDIR="$(mktemp -d)" || exit 1
  SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
  SCRIPT="${SCRIPT_DIR}/artifact-cleanup.sh"

  # Create mock artifact CSV file for testing
  MOCK_CSV="${TEST_TMPDIR}/artifacts.csv"
}

teardown() {
  # Clean up temporary test directory
  rm -rf "${TEST_TMPDIR}"
}

# Test 1: Script exists and is executable
@test "script exists and is executable" {
  [ -f "${SCRIPT}" ]
  [ -x "${SCRIPT}" ]
}

# Test 2: Script fails gracefully with no input
@test "script fails with missing input file" {
  run "${SCRIPT}" --input /nonexistent/file.csv --dry-run
  [ "$status" -ne 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"not found"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Error"* ]]
}

# Test 3: Parse simple artifact CSV with headers
@test "parses artifact CSV with correct format" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-2
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact-1"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact-2"* ]]
}

# Test 4: Dry-run mode does not actually delete
@test "dry-run mode reports what would be deleted" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,2000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"DRY RUN"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"dry-run"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"dry run"* ]]
}

# Test 5: Apply max-age retention policy
@test "deletes artifacts older than max-age" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
old-artifact,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
new-artifact,2000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"old-artifact"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
}

# Test 6: Apply max-total-size retention policy
@test "keeps only latest artifacts when total size exceeds limit" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,3000,2026-05-01,run-1
artifact-2,3000,2026-05-02,run-1
artifact-3,3000,2026-05-03,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-total-size 5000
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
}

# Test 7: Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
@test "keeps only latest N artifacts per workflow" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
artifact-2,1000,2026-05-02,run-1
artifact-3,1000,2026-05-03,run-1
artifact-4,1000,2026-05-04,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --keep-latest 2
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact-1"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"artifact-2"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
}

# Test 8: Summary includes total space reclaimed
@test "summary includes total space reclaimed" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,5000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,3000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"space"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Space"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"reclaimed"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"total"* ]]
}

# Test 9: Summary shows artifacts retained vs deleted
@test "summary shows count of artifacts retained and deleted" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,1000,2026-05-05,run-1
artifact-3,1000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 5
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"delete"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Delete"* ]]
  [[ "$output" == *"retain"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"Retain"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"keep"* ]]
}

# Test 10: Multiple retention policies combine correctly (all must be satisfied)
@test "multiple policies are combined (AND logic)" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
artifact-1,1000,2026-04-20,run-1
artifact-2,1000,2026-04-25,run-1
artifact-3,1000,2026-05-04,run-1
artifact-4,1000,2026-05-05,run-1
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run --max-age 10 --keep-latest 2
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"artifact"* ]]
}

# Test 11: Help message
@test "displays help message with --help flag" {
  run "${SCRIPT}" --help
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
  [[ "$output" == *"Usage"* ]] || [[ "$output" == *"usage"* ]]
}

# Test 12: Handle empty CSV gracefully
@test "handles empty artifact list" {
  cat > "${MOCK_CSV}" << 'EOF'
name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
EOF

  run "${SCRIPT}" --input "${MOCK_CSV}" --dry-run
  [ "$status" -eq 0 ]
}

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds using date command
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file
# Returns a temp file with artifact data suitable for processing
load_artifacts() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)

  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    # Skip header
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    echo "$name,$size_bytes,$creation_date,$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_file"
  done < "$input_file"

  echo "$temp_file"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
# Outputs lines of artifacts that should be deleted
apply_max_age() {
  local artifacts_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    cat "$artifacts_file"
    return
  fi

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local age_days
    age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$creation_date")

    if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$artifacts_file"
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
# Processes marked artifacts and marks additional ones for deletion if needed
apply_max_total_size() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate total size from KEEP entries
  local total_size=0
  local -a delete_old=()

  # First pass: count kept artifacts
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
  if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
    local -a to_delete_by_age=()

    while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
      if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        to_delete_by_age+=("$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id")
      fi
    done < "$marked_file"

    # Sort by date (oldest first) and mark for deletion until under limit
    local IFS=$'\n'
    local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${to_delete_by_age[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      local name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id
      IFS='|' read -r creation_date name size creation_date workflow_run_id <<< "$entry"

      if (( total_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
        break
      fi
      delete_old+=("$name")
      total_size=$((total_size - size))
    done
  fi

  # Output with updated decisions
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local should_delete=false
    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      should_delete=true
    else
      # Check if in delete_old list
      for d in "${delete_old[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$d" == "$name" ]]; then
          should_delete=true
          break
        fi
      done
    fi

    if [[ "$should_delete" == "true" ]]; then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
# Marks older artifacts in each workflow for deletion if N exceeded
apply_keep_latest() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  local temp_groupby
  temp_groupby=$(mktemp)

  # Group by workflow_run_id and sort by date (newest first)
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      echo "$workflow_run_id|$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_groupby"
    else
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # Sort by workflow_run_id and date (newest first)
  local IFS=$'\n'
  local -a sorted=($(sort -t'|' -k1,1 -k2,2r "$temp_groupby" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
  unset IFS

  if [[ -f "$temp_groupby" ]]; then
    rm "$temp_groupby"
  fi

  # Keep only latest N per workflow
  local current_workflow=""
  local count=0

  if (( ${#sorted[@]} > 0 )) && [[ -n "${sorted[0]}" ]]; then
    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue

      local workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes
      IFS='|' read -r workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes x y <<< "$entry"

      if [[ "$workflow_run_id" != "$current_workflow" ]]; then
        current_workflow="$workflow_run_id"
        count=0
      fi

      if (( count < KEEP_LATEST )); then
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
        (( count++ ))
      else
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    done
  fi
}

# Generate deletion plan and summary
generate_plan() {
  local marked_file="$1"
  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0
  local total_size=0

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))
    total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))

    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + size_bytes))
      echo "DELETE: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts from CSV
  local artifacts_file
  artifacts_file=$(load_artifacts "$INPUT_FILE")

  # Apply retention policies in sequence
  local marked_file
  marked_file=$(mktemp)

  apply_max_age "$artifacts_file" > "$marked_file"

  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_max_total_size "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_keep_latest "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  # Generate report
  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  # Clean up temp files
  rm -f "$artifacts_file" "$marked_file"
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds using date command
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file
# Returns a temp file with artifact data suitable for processing
load_artifacts() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)

  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    # Skip header
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    echo "$name,$size_bytes,$creation_date,$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_file"
  done < "$input_file"

  echo "$temp_file"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
# Outputs lines of artifacts that should be deleted
apply_max_age() {
  local artifacts_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    cat "$artifacts_file"
    return
  fi

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local age_days
    age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$creation_date")

    if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$artifacts_file"
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
# Processes marked artifacts and marks additional ones for deletion if needed
apply_max_total_size() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate total size from KEEP entries
  local total_size=0
  local -a delete_old=()

  # First pass: count kept artifacts
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
  if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
    local -a to_delete_by_age=()

    while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
      if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        to_delete_by_age+=("$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id")
      fi
    done < "$marked_file"

    # Sort by date (oldest first) and mark for deletion until under limit
    local IFS=$'\n'
    local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${to_delete_by_age[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      local name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id
      IFS='|' read -r creation_date name size creation_date workflow_run_id <<< "$entry"

      if (( total_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
        break
      fi
      delete_old+=("$name")
      total_size=$((total_size - size))
    done
  fi

  # Output with updated decisions
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local should_delete=false
    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      should_delete=true
    else
      # Check if in delete_old list
      for d in "${delete_old[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$d" == "$name" ]]; then
          should_delete=true
          break
        fi
      done
    fi

    if [[ "$should_delete" == "true" ]]; then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
# Marks older artifacts in each workflow for deletion if N exceeded
apply_keep_latest() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  local temp_groupby
  temp_groupby=$(mktemp)

  # Group by workflow_run_id and sort by date (newest first)
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      echo "$workflow_run_id|$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_groupby"
    else
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # Sort by workflow_run_id and date (newest first)
  local IFS=$'\n'
  local -a sorted=($(sort -t'|' -k1,1 -k2,2r "$temp_groupby" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
  unset IFS

  if [[ -f "$temp_groupby" ]]; then
    rm "$temp_groupby"
  fi

  # Keep only latest N per workflow
  local current_workflow=""
  local count=0

  if (( ${#sorted[@]} > 0 )) && [[ -n "${sorted[0]}" ]]; then
    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue

      local workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes
      IFS='|' read -r workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes x y <<< "$entry"

      if [[ "$workflow_run_id" != "$current_workflow" ]]; then
        current_workflow="$workflow_run_id"
        count=0
      fi

      if (( count < KEEP_LATEST )); then
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
        (( count++ ))
      else
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    done
  fi
}

# Generate deletion plan and summary
generate_plan() {
  local marked_file="$1"
  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0
  local total_size=0

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))
    total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))

    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + size_bytes))
      echo "DELETE: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts from CSV
  local artifacts_file
  artifacts_file=$(load_artifacts "$INPUT_FILE")

  # Apply retention policies in sequence
  local marked_file
  marked_file=$(mktemp)

  apply_max_age "$artifacts_file" > "$marked_file"

  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_max_total_size "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_keep_latest "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  # Generate report
  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  # Clean up temp files

# Execute main function

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Arrays to track artifacts for deletion/retention
declare -a ARTIFACTS_TO_DELETE
declare -a ARTIFACTS_TO_RETAIN

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file into associative arrays
load_artifacts() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local line_num=0

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))

    # Skip header line
    if [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    # Store artifact data
    artifacts_ref["${name}|name"]="$name"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|size"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|date"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_ref["${name}|run"]="$workflow_run_id"
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
apply_max_age() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ ! "$key" =~ \|date$ ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    local artifact_name="${key%|date}"
    local artifact_date="${artifacts_ref[$key]}"
    local age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$artifact_date")

    if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
      delete_ref+=("$artifact_name")
    fi
  done
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
apply_max_total_size() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  # Collect all artifacts with size and sort by date (oldest first)
  local -a temp_artifacts
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      temp_artifacts+=("${key%|name}")
    fi
  done

  # Sort by creation date (oldest to newest)
  local -a sorted_artifacts
  local -a artifact_data
  for artifact in "${temp_artifacts[@]}"; do
    artifact_data+=("${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|date]}:$artifact")
  done

  # Sort and extract artifact names
  local IFS=$'\n'
  sorted_artifacts=($(sort <<< "${artifact_data[*]}"))
  unset IFS

  # Calculate total size and mark for deletion if exceeds limit
  local total_size=0
  local marked_count=0
  for entry in "${sorted_artifacts[@]}"; do
    local artifact="${entry#*:}"
    local size="${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|size]}"
    total_size=$((total_size + size))

    if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      delete_ref+=("$artifact")
      (( marked_count++ ))
    fi
  done
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
apply_keep_latest() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -n delete_ref=$2
  local -n retain_ref=$3

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    return
  fi

  # Group artifacts by workflow_run_id
  declare -A workflow_artifacts
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|run$ ]]; then
      local artifact_name="${key%|run}"
      local workflow_id="${artifacts_ref[$key]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$workflow_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$workflow_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$workflow_id"]+="$artifact_name "
    fi
  done

  # For each workflow, keep only the N latest
  for workflow_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
    local artifacts_list="${workflow_artifacts[$workflow_id]}"

    # Sort by creation date (newest first)
    local -a artifact_array
    local -a sort_data
    for artifact in $artifacts_list; do
      local date="${artifacts_ref[${artifact}|date]}"
      sort_data+=("$date:$artifact")
    done

    local IFS=$'\n'
    artifact_array=($(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    # Mark older artifacts for deletion
    for (( i = KEEP_LATEST; i < ${#artifact_array[@]}; i++ )); do
      local entry="${artifact_array[$i]}"
      local artifact="${entry#*:}"
      delete_ref+=("$artifact")
    done
  done
}

# Consolidate deletion decisions and generate report
generate_plan() {
  local -n artifacts_ref=$1
  local -a all_deletions=()

  # Collect all artifacts marked for deletion
  for key in "${!artifacts_ref[@]}"; do
    if [[ ! "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      continue
    fi

    local artifact_name="${key%|name}"
    # Check if should be deleted by any policy
    local should_delete=false

    if [[ ! -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
      local age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_ref[${artifact_name}|date]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        should_delete=true
      fi
    fi

    if [[ ! -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
      # Would need to recalculate here, simplified for now
      :
    fi

    if [[ ! -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
      # Simplified check
      :
    fi
  done
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts
  declare -A artifacts
  load_artifacts artifacts

  # Apply retention policies
  declare -a to_delete
  declare -a to_retain

  apply_max_age artifacts to_delete to_retain
  apply_max_total_size artifacts to_delete to_retain
  apply_keep_latest artifacts to_delete to_retain

  # Generate deletion plan and summary
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
  fi

  echo ""
  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  # Calculate summary statistics
  local total_artifacts=0
  local total_size=0
  declare -A processed_artifacts
  local deleted_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for key in "${!artifacts[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$key" =~ \|name$ ]]; then
      (( total_artifacts++ ))
      local artifact="${key%|name}"
      total_size=$((total_size + artifacts[${artifact}|size]))
      processed_artifacts["$artifact"]=0
    fi
  done

  # Mark artifacts for deletion
  for artifact in "${to_delete[@]}"; do
    if [[ -n "$artifact" ]]; then
      processed_artifacts["$artifact"]=1
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts[${artifact}|size]))
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts[${artifact}|size]} bytes, date: ${artifacts[${artifact}|date]})"
    fi
  done

  # Report retained artifacts
  local retained_count=0
  for artifact in "${!processed_artifacts[@]}"; do
    if [[ "${processed_artifacts[$artifact]}" == "0" ]]; then
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts[${artifact}|size]} bytes, date: ${artifacts[${artifact}|date]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

apply_max_total_size() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate total size from KEEP entries
  local total_size=0
  local -a delete_old=()

  # First pass: count kept artifacts
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
  if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
    local -a to_delete_by_age=()

    while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
      if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        to_delete_by_age+=("$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id")
      fi
    done < "$marked_file"

    # Sort by date (oldest first) and mark for deletion until under limit

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds using date command
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file
# Returns a temp file with artifact data suitable for processing
load_artifacts() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)

  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    # Skip header
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    echo "$name,$size_bytes,$creation_date,$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_file"
  done < "$input_file"

  echo "$temp_file"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
# Outputs lines of artifacts that should be deleted
apply_max_age() {
  local artifacts_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    cat "$artifacts_file"
    return
  fi

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local age_days
    age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$creation_date")

    if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$artifacts_file"
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
# Processes marked artifacts and marks additional ones for deletion if needed
apply_max_total_size() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate total size from KEEP entries
  local total_size=0
  local -a delete_old=()

  # First pass: count kept artifacts
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
  if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
    local -a to_delete_by_age=()

    while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
      if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        to_delete_by_age+=("$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id")
      fi
    done < "$marked_file"

    # Sort by date (oldest first) and mark for deletion until under limit
    local IFS=$'\n'
    local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${to_delete_by_age[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      local name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id
      IFS='|' read -r creation_date name size creation_date workflow_run_id <<< "$entry"

      if (( total_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
        break
      fi
      delete_old+=("$name")
      total_size=$((total_size - size))
    done
  fi

  # Output with updated decisions
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local should_delete=false
    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      should_delete=true
    else
      # Check if in delete_old list
      for d in "${delete_old[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$d" == "$name" ]]; then
          should_delete=true
          break
        fi
      done
    fi

    if [[ "$should_delete" == "true" ]]; then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
# Marks older artifacts in each workflow for deletion if N exceeded
apply_keep_latest() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  local temp_groupby
  temp_groupby=$(mktemp)

  # Group by workflow_run_id and sort by date (newest first)
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      echo "$workflow_run_id|$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_groupby"
    else
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # Sort by workflow_run_id and date (newest first)
  local IFS=$'\n'
  local -a sorted=($(sort -t'|' -k1,1 -k2,2r "$temp_groupby" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
  unset IFS

  if [[ -f "$temp_groupby" ]]; then
    rm "$temp_groupby"
  fi

  # Keep only latest N per workflow
  local current_workflow=""
  local count=0

  if (( ${#sorted[@]} > 0 )) && [[ -n "${sorted[0]}" ]]; then
    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue

      local workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes
      IFS='|' read -r workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes x y <<< "$entry"

      if [[ "$workflow_run_id" != "$current_workflow" ]]; then
        current_workflow="$workflow_run_id"
        count=0
      fi

      if (( count < KEEP_LATEST )); then
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
        (( count++ ))
      else
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    done
  fi
}

# Generate deletion plan and summary
generate_plan() {
  local marked_file="$1"
  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0
  local total_size=0

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))
    total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))

    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + size_bytes))
      echo "DELETE: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts from CSV
  local artifacts_file
  artifacts_file=$(load_artifacts "$INPUT_FILE")

  # Apply retention policies in sequence
  local marked_file
  marked_file=$(mktemp)

  apply_max_age "$artifacts_file" > "$marked_file"

  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_max_total_size "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_keep_latest "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  # Generate report
  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  # Clean up temp files
  rm -f "$artifacts_file" "$marked_file"
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do

      IFS='|' read -r creation_date name size creation_date workflow_run_id <<< "$entry"

      if (( total_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
        break
      fi
      delete_old+=("$name")
      total_size=$((total_size - size))
    done
  fi

  # Output with updated decisions
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local should_delete=false
    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      should_delete=true
    else
      # Check if in delete_old list
      for d in "${delete_old[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$d" == "$name" ]]; then
          should_delete=true
          break
        fi
      done
    fi

    if [[ "$should_delete" == "true" ]]; then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
# Marks older artifacts in each workflow for deletion if N exceeded
apply_keep_latest() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  local temp_groupby
  temp_groupby=$(mktemp)

  # Group by workflow_run_id and sort by date (newest first)
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      echo "$workflow_run_id|$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_groupby"
    else
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # Sort by workflow_run_id and date (newest first)
  local IFS=$'\n'
  local -a sorted=($(sort -t'|' -k1,1 -k2,2r "$temp_groupby" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
  unset IFS

  if [[ -f "$temp_groupby" ]]; then
    rm "$temp_groupby"
  fi

  # Keep only latest N per workflow
  local current_workflow=""
  local count=0

  if (( ${#sorted[@]} > 0 )) && [[ -n "${sorted[0]}" ]]; then
    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue

      local workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes
      IFS='|' read -r workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes x y <<< "$entry"

      if [[ "$workflow_run_id" != "$current_workflow" ]]; then
        current_workflow="$workflow_run_id"
        count=0
      fi

      if (( count < KEEP_LATEST )); then
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
        (( count++ ))
      else
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    done
  fi
}

# Generate deletion plan and summary
generate_plan() {
  local marked_file="$1"
  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0
  local total_size=0

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))
    total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))

    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + size_bytes))
      echo "DELETE: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts from CSV
  local artifacts_file
  artifacts_file=$(load_artifacts "$INPUT_FILE")

  # Apply retention policies in sequence
  local marked_file
  marked_file=$(mktemp)

  apply_max_age "$artifacts_file" > "$marked_file"

  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_max_total_size "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_keep_latest "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  # Generate report
  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  # Clean up temp files
  rm -f "$artifacts_file" "$marked_file"
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"
