#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds using date command
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file
# Returns a temp file with artifact data suitable for processing
load_artifacts() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)

  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    # Skip header
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    echo "$name,$size_bytes,$creation_date,$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_file"
  done < "$input_file"

  echo "$temp_file"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
# Outputs lines of artifacts with decision marker (KEEP or DELETE)
apply_max_age() {
  local artifacts_file="$1"

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$creation_date")

      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      else
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    fi
  done < "$artifacts_file"
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
# Processes marked artifacts and marks additional ones for deletion if needed
apply_max_total_size() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate total size from KEEP entries
  local total_size=0
  local -a delete_old=()

  # First pass: count kept artifacts
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    [[ -z "$action" ]] && continue
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
  if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
    local -a to_delete_by_age=()

    while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
      if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        to_delete_by_age+=("$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id")
      fi
    done < "$marked_file"

    # Sort by date (oldest first) and mark for deletion until under limit
    local IFS=$'\n'
    local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${to_delete_by_age[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      local name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id
      IFS='|' read -r creation_date name size creation_date workflow_run_id <<< "$entry"

      if (( total_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
        break
      fi
      delete_old+=("$name")
      total_size=$((total_size - size))
    done
  fi

  # Output with updated decisions
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local should_delete=false
    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      should_delete=true
    else
      # Check if in delete_old list
      for d in "${delete_old[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$d" == "$name" ]]; then
          should_delete=true
          break
        fi
      done
    fi

    if [[ "$should_delete" == "true" ]]; then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
# Marks older artifacts in each workflow for deletion if N exceeded
apply_keep_latest() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  local temp_groupby
  temp_groupby=$(mktemp)

  # Group by workflow_run_id and sort by date (newest first)
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      echo "$workflow_run_id|$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_groupby"
    else
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # Sort by workflow_run_id and date (newest first)
  local IFS=$'\n'
  local -a sorted=($(sort -t'|' -k1,1 -k2,2r "$temp_groupby" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
  unset IFS

  if [[ -f "$temp_groupby" ]]; then
    rm "$temp_groupby"
  fi

  # Keep only latest N per workflow
  local current_workflow=""
  local count=0

  if (( ${#sorted[@]} > 0 )) && [[ -n "${sorted[0]}" ]]; then
    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue

      local workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes
      IFS='|' read -r workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes x y <<< "$entry"

      if [[ "$workflow_run_id" != "$current_workflow" ]]; then
        current_workflow="$workflow_run_id"
        count=0
      fi

      if (( count < KEEP_LATEST )); then
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
        (( count++ ))
      else
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    done
  fi
}

# Generate deletion plan and summary
generate_plan() {
  local marked_file="$1"
  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0
  local total_size=0

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))
    total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))

    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + size_bytes))
      echo "DELETE: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts from CSV
  local artifacts_file
  artifacts_file=$(load_artifacts "$INPUT_FILE")

  # Apply retention policies in sequence
  local marked_file
  marked_file=$(mktemp)

  apply_max_age "$artifacts_file" > "$marked_file"

  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_max_total_size "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_keep_latest "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  # Generate report
  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  # Clean up temp files
  rm -f "$artifacts_file" "$marked_file"
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds using date command
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file
# Returns a temp file with artifact data suitable for processing
load_artifacts() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)

  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    # Skip header
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    echo "$name,$size_bytes,$creation_date,$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_file"
  done < "$input_file"

  echo "$temp_file"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
# Outputs lines of artifacts with decision marker (KEEP or DELETE)
apply_max_age() {
  local artifacts_file="$1"

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$creation_date")

      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      else
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    fi
  done < "$artifacts_file"
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
# Processes marked artifacts and marks additional ones for deletion if needed
apply_max_total_size() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate total size from KEEP entries
  local total_size=0
  local -a delete_old=()

  # First pass: count kept artifacts
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    [[ -z "$action" ]] && continue
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
  if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
    local -a to_delete_by_age=()

    while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
      [[ -z "$action" ]] && continue
      if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        to_delete_by_age+=("$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes")
      fi
    done < "$marked_file"

    # Sort by date (oldest first) and mark for deletion until under limit
    local IFS=$'\n'
    local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${to_delete_by_age[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      local name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id
      IFS='|' read -r creation_date name size creation_date workflow_run_id <<< "$entry"

      if (( total_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
        break
      fi
      delete_old+=("$name")
      total_size=$((total_size - size))
    done
  fi

  # Output with updated decisions
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    local should_delete=false
    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      should_delete=true
    else
      # Check if in delete_old list
      for d in "${delete_old[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$d" == "$name" ]]; then
          should_delete=true
          break
        fi
      done
    fi

    if [[ "$should_delete" == "true" ]]; then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
# Marks older artifacts in each workflow for deletion if N exceeded
apply_keep_latest() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  local temp_groupby
  temp_groupby=$(mktemp)

  # Group by workflow_run_id and sort by date (newest first)
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      echo "$workflow_run_id|$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_groupby"
    else
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # Sort by workflow_run_id and date (newest first)
  local IFS=$'\n'
  local -a sorted=($(sort -t'|' -k1,1 -k2,2r "$temp_groupby" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
  unset IFS

  if [[ -f "$temp_groupby" ]]; then
    rm "$temp_groupby"
  fi

  # Keep only latest N per workflow
  local current_workflow=""
  local count=0

  if (( ${#sorted[@]} > 0 )) && [[ -n "${sorted[0]}" ]]; then
    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue

      local workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes
      IFS='|' read -r workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes x y <<< "$entry"

      if [[ "$workflow_run_id" != "$current_workflow" ]]; then
        current_workflow="$workflow_run_id"
        count=0
      fi

      if (( count < KEEP_LATEST )); then
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
        (( count++ ))
      else
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    done
  fi
}

# Generate deletion plan and summary
generate_plan() {
  local marked_file="$1"
  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0
  local total_size=0

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))
    total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))

    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + size_bytes))
      echo "DELETE: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts from CSV
  local artifacts_file
  artifacts_file=$(load_artifacts "$INPUT_FILE")

  # Apply retention policies in sequence
  local marked_file
  marked_file=$(mktemp)

  apply_max_age "$artifacts_file" > "$marked_file"

  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_max_total_size "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_keep_latest "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  # Generate report
  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  # Clean up temp files
  rm -f "$artifacts_file" "$marked_file"
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  rm -f "$artifacts_file" "$marked_file" "$csv_file"

}

main

# Load artifacts from CSV file
# Returns a temp file with artifact data suitable for processing
load_artifacts() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)

  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    # Skip header
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    echo "$name,$size_bytes,$creation_date,$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_file"
  done < "$input_file"

  echo "$temp_file"
}

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
EOF
}

parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_name
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_name["$name"]="$name"
    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"

  # Determine which artifacts to delete
  declare -A delete_decision  # maps artifact name to KEEP or DELETE
  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    delete_decision["$artifact"]="KEEP"
  done

  # Apply max-age policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_date[$artifact]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
      fi
    done
  fi

  # Apply keep-latest-N policy
  if [[ -n "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    # Group by workflow
    declare -A workflow_artifacts
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local run_id="${artifacts_run[$artifact]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]+="$artifact "
    done

    # For each workflow, keep only latest N (by date)
    for run_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
      local artifacts_str="${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]}"
      declare -a workflow_list=()
      declare -a sort_data=()

      for artifact in $artifacts_str; do
        workflow_list+=("$artifact")
        sort_data+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      done

      # Sort by date (newest first)
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      local kept=0
      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( kept < KEEP_LATEST )); then
          (( kept++ ))
        else
          delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        fi
      done
    done
  fi

  # Apply max-total-size policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    # Calculate total size of artifacts kept so far
    local total_kept_size=0
    declare -a kept_artifacts=()

    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
        kept_artifacts+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      fi
    done

    # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
    if (( total_kept_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${kept_artifacts[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( total_kept_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
          break
        fi
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size - artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      done
    fi
  fi

  # Generate output
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))

    if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

main "$@"

        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_name
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_name["$name"]="$name"
    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"

  # Determine which artifacts to delete
  declare -A delete_decision  # maps artifact name to KEEP or DELETE
  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    delete_decision["$artifact"]="KEEP"
  done

  # Apply max-age policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_date[$artifact]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
      fi
    done
  fi

  # Apply keep-latest-N policy
  if [[ -n "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    # Group by workflow
    declare -A workflow_artifacts
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local run_id="${artifacts_run[$artifact]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]+="$artifact "
    done

    # For each workflow, keep only latest N (by date)
    for run_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
      local artifacts_str="${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]}"
      declare -a workflow_list=()
      declare -a sort_data=()

      for artifact in $artifacts_str; do
        workflow_list+=("$artifact")
        sort_data+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      done

      # Sort by date (newest first)
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      local kept=0
      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( kept < KEEP_LATEST )); then
          (( kept++ ))
        else
          delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        fi
      done
    done
  fi

  # Apply max-total-size policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    # Calculate total size of artifacts kept so far
    local total_kept_size=0
    declare -a kept_artifacts=()

    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
        kept_artifacts+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      fi
    done

    # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
    if (( total_kept_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${kept_artifacts[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( total_kept_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
          break
        fi
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size - artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      done
    fi
  fi

  # Generate output
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))

    if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

main "$@"

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

# Global configuration
DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

# Display usage information
usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  # Show artifacts older than 30 days (dry-run)
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

  # Keep total size under 1GB, keep 5 latest per workflow
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-total-size 1073741824 --keep-latest 5

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
  artifact-2,2000,2026-05-02,run-1
EOF
}

# Parse command line arguments
parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

# Validate input file exists
validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

# Calculate days between two dates (YYYY-MM-DD format)
days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  # Convert dates to epoch seconds using date command
  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate difference in days
  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

# Load artifacts from CSV file
# Returns a temp file with artifact data suitable for processing
load_artifacts() {
  local input_file="$1"
  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)

  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    # Skip header
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    # Skip empty lines
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    echo "$name,$size_bytes,$creation_date,$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_file"
  done < "$input_file"

  echo "$temp_file"
}

# Apply max-age retention policy
# Outputs lines of artifacts with decision marker (KEEP or DELETE)
apply_max_age() {
  local artifacts_file="$1"

  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    if [[ -z "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "$creation_date")

      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      else
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    fi
  done < "$artifacts_file"
}

# Apply max-total-size retention policy
# Processes marked artifacts and marks additional ones for deletion if needed
apply_max_total_size() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  # Calculate total size from KEEP entries
  local total_size=0
  local -a delete_old=()

  # First pass: count kept artifacts
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    [[ -z "$action" ]] && continue
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
  if (( total_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
    local -a to_delete_by_age=()

    while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
      [[ -z "$action" ]] && continue
      if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        to_delete_by_age+=("$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes")
      fi
    done < "$marked_file"

    # Sort by date (oldest first) and mark for deletion until under limit
    local IFS=$'\n'
    local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${to_delete_by_age[*]}"))
    unset IFS

    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      local name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id
      IFS='|' read -r creation_date name size creation_date workflow_run_id <<< "$entry"

      if (( total_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
        break
      fi
      delete_old+=("$name")
      total_size=$((total_size - size))
    done
  fi

  # Output with updated decisions
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    [[ -z "$action" ]] && continue
    local should_delete=false
    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      should_delete=true
    else
      # Check if in delete_old list
      for d in "${delete_old[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$d" == "$name" ]]; then
          should_delete=true
          break
        fi
      done
    fi

    if [[ "$should_delete" == "true" ]]; then
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    else
      echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"
}

# Apply keep-latest-N retention policy
# Marks older artifacts in each workflow for deletion if N exceeded
apply_keep_latest() {
  local marked_file="$1"

  if [[ -z "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    cat "$marked_file"
    return
  fi

  local temp_groupby
  temp_groupby=$(mktemp)

  # Group by workflow_run_id and sort by date (newest first)
  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    if [[ "$action" == "KEEP" ]]; then
      echo "$workflow_run_id|$creation_date|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id" >> "$temp_groupby"
    else
      echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  # Sort by workflow_run_id and date (newest first)
  local IFS=$'\n'
  local -a sorted=($(sort -t'|' -k1,1 -k2,2r "$temp_groupby" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
  unset IFS

  if [[ -f "$temp_groupby" ]]; then
    rm "$temp_groupby"
  fi

  # Keep only latest N per workflow
  local current_workflow=""
  local count=0

  if (( ${#sorted[@]} > 0 )) && [[ -n "${sorted[0]}" ]]; then
    for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
      [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue

      local workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes
      IFS='|' read -r workflow_run_id creation_date name size_bytes x y <<< "$entry"

      if [[ "$workflow_run_id" != "$current_workflow" ]]; then
        current_workflow="$workflow_run_id"
        count=0
      fi

      if (( count < KEEP_LATEST )); then
        echo "KEEP|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
        (( count++ ))
      else
        echo "DELETE|$name|$size_bytes|$creation_date|$workflow_run_id"
      fi
    done
  fi
}

# Generate deletion plan and summary
generate_plan() {
  local marked_file="$1"
  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0
  local total_size=0

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  while IFS='|' read -r action name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))
    total_size=$((total_size + size_bytes))

    if [[ "$action" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + size_bytes))
      echo "DELETE: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $name (size: ${size_bytes} bytes, date: ${creation_date})"
    fi
  done < "$marked_file"

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

# Main execution
main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Load artifacts from CSV
  local artifacts_file
  artifacts_file=$(load_artifacts "$INPUT_FILE")

  # Apply retention policies in sequence
  local marked_file
  marked_file=$(mktemp)

  apply_max_age "$artifacts_file" > "$marked_file"

  local temp_file
  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_max_total_size "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  temp_file=$(mktemp)
  apply_keep_latest "$marked_file" > "$temp_file"
  mv "$temp_file" "$marked_file"

  # Generate report
  generate_plan "$marked_file"

  # Clean up temp files
  rm -f "$artifacts_file" "$marked_file"
}

# Execute main function
main "$@"

tool_use_result.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -euo pipefail

DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
EOF
}

parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_name
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_name["$name"]="$name"
    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"

  # Determine which artifacts to delete
  declare -A delete_decision  # maps artifact name to KEEP or DELETE
  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    delete_decision["$artifact"]="KEEP"
  done

  # Apply max-age policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_date[$artifact]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
      fi
    done
  fi

  # Apply keep-latest-N policy
  if [[ -n "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    # Group by workflow
    declare -A workflow_artifacts
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local run_id="${artifacts_run[$artifact]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]+="$artifact "
    done

    # For each workflow, keep only latest N (by date)
    for run_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
      local artifacts_str="${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]}"
      declare -a workflow_list=()
      declare -a sort_data=()

      for artifact in $artifacts_str; do
        workflow_list+=("$artifact")
        sort_data+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      done

      # Sort by date (newest first)
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      local kept=0
      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( kept < KEEP_LATEST )); then
          (( kept++ ))
        else
          delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        fi
      done
    done
  fi

  # Apply max-total-size policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    # Calculate total size of artifacts kept so far
    local total_kept_size=0
    declare -a kept_artifacts=()

    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
        kept_artifacts+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      fi
    done

    # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
    if (( total_kept_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${kept_artifacts[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( total_kept_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
          break
        fi
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size - artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      done
    fi
  fi

  # Generate output
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))

    if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

main "$@"

Let me set up a test harness that runs the workflow through act for multiple test cases.

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Test harness to run all test cases through GitHub Actions via act
# This ensures all tests execute in an isolated Docker container

set -uo pipefail

OUTPUT_FILE="act-result.txt"
WORKFLOW_FILE=".github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml"
TEST_COUNT=0
PASSED_COUNT=0
FAILED_COUNT=0

# Initialize output file
: > "$OUTPUT_FILE"

log_result() {
  local test_name="$1"
  local status="$2"
  local details="$3"

  echo "=====================================================================" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "TEST: $test_name" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "STATUS: $status" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "=====================================================================" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "$details" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"

  (( TEST_COUNT++ ))
  if [[ "$status" == "PASSED" ]]; then
    (( PASSED_COUNT++ ))
  else
    (( FAILED_COUNT++ ))
  fi
}

run_act_test() {
  local test_name="$1"

  echo "Running test via act: $test_name..."

  # Run the workflow through act
  local act_output
  act_output=$(act push \
    --rm \
    --job test \
    2>&1)

  local exit_code=$?

  # Check if the workflow succeeded
  if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]] && echo "$act_output" | grep -q "Job succeeded"; then
    log_result "$test_name" "PASSED" "$act_output"
    echo "✓ $test_name PASSED"
  else
    log_result "$test_name" "FAILED" "$act_output"
    echo "✗ $test_name FAILED (exit code: $exit_code)"
    return 1
  fi
}

main() {
  echo "Artifact Cleanup Script - Act Test Harness"
  echo "=========================================="
  echo ""

  # Verify required tools are available
  if ! command -v act &> /dev/null; then
    echo "Error: 'act' is not installed" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if ! command -v actionlint &> /dev/null; then
    echo "Error: 'actionlint' is not installed" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  # Validate workflow with actionlint
  echo "Validating workflow with actionlint..."
  if ! actionlint "$WORKFLOW_FILE"; then
    echo "Error: Workflow validation failed" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "✓ Workflow is valid"
  echo ""

  # Run all test cases through act
  echo "Running tests through act..."
  echo ""

  run_act_test "Complete Workflow Test (all jobs)"

  # Print summary
  echo ""
  echo "=========================================="
  echo "Test Summary"
  echo "=========================================="
  echo "Total tests: $TEST_COUNT"
  echo "Passed: $PASSED_COUNT"
  echo "Failed: $FAILED_COUNT"
  echo ""
  echo "Results written to: $OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo ""

  if [[ $FAILED_COUNT -gt 0 ]]; then
    echo "Some tests failed. See $OUTPUT_FILE for details."
    exit 1
  else
    echo "All tests passed!"
    exit 0
  fi
}

main "$@"

    echo "All tests passed!"
    exit 0
  fi
}

tool_use_result.originalFile:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Test harness to run all test cases through GitHub Actions via act
# This ensures all tests execute in an isolated Docker container

set -uo pipefail

OUTPUT_FILE="act-result.txt"
WORKFLOW_FILE=".github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml"
TEST_COUNT=0
PASSED_COUNT=0
FAILED_COUNT=0

# Initialize output file
: > "$OUTPUT_FILE"

log_result() {
  local test_name="$1"
  local status="$2"
  local details="$3"

  echo "=====================================================================" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "TEST: $test_name" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "STATUS: $status" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "=====================================================================" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "$details" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo "" >> "$OUTPUT_FILE"

  (( TEST_COUNT++ ))
  if [[ "$status" == "PASSED" ]]; then
    (( PASSED_COUNT++ ))
  else
    (( FAILED_COUNT++ ))
  fi
}

run_act_test() {
  local test_name="$1"

  echo "Running test via act: $test_name..."

  # Run the workflow through act
  local act_output
  act_output=$(act push \
    --rm \
    --job test \
    2>&1)

  local exit_code=$?

  # Check if the workflow succeeded
  if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]] && echo "$act_output" | grep -q "Job succeeded"; then
    log_result "$test_name" "PASSED" "$act_output"
    echo "✓ $test_name PASSED"
  else
    log_result "$test_name" "FAILED" "$act_output"
    echo "✗ $test_name FAILED (exit code: $exit_code)"
    return 1
  fi
}

main() {
  echo "Artifact Cleanup Script - Act Test Harness"
  echo "=========================================="
  echo ""

  # Verify required tools are available
  if ! command -v act &> /dev/null; then
    echo "Error: 'act' is not installed" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if ! command -v actionlint &> /dev/null; then
    echo "Error: 'actionlint' is not installed" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  # Validate workflow with actionlint
  echo "Validating workflow with actionlint..."
  if ! actionlint "$WORKFLOW_FILE"; then
    echo "Error: Workflow validation failed" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "✓ Workflow is valid"
  echo ""

  # Run all test cases through act
  echo "Running tests through act..."
  echo ""

  run_act_test "Complete Workflow Test (all jobs)"

  # Print summary
  echo ""
  echo "=========================================="
  echo "Test Summary"
  echo "=========================================="
  echo "Total tests: $TEST_COUNT"
  echo "Passed: $PASSED_COUNT"
  echo "Failed: $FAILED_COUNT"
  echo ""
  echo "Results written to: $OUTPUT_FILE"
  echo ""

  if [[ $FAILED_COUNT -gt 0 ]]; then
    echo "Some tests failed. See $OUTPUT_FILE for details."
    exit 1
  else
    echo "All tests passed!"
    exit 0
  fi
}

main "$@"

input.old_string:
# Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_name
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_name["$name"]="$name"
    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"
input.new_string:
# Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -uo pipefail

DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
EOF
}

parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_name
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_name["$name"]="$name"
    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"

  # Determine which artifacts to delete
  declare -A delete_decision  # maps artifact name to KEEP or DELETE
  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    delete_decision["$artifact"]="KEEP"
  done

  # Apply max-age policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_date[$artifact]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
      fi
    done
  fi

  # Apply keep-latest-N policy
  if [[ -n "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    # Group by workflow
    declare -A workflow_artifacts
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local run_id="${artifacts_run[$artifact]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]+="$artifact "
    done

    # For each workflow, keep only latest N (by date)
    for run_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
      local artifacts_str="${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]}"
      declare -a workflow_list=()
      declare -a sort_data=()

      for artifact in $artifacts_str; do
        workflow_list+=("$artifact")
        sort_data+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      done

      # Sort by date (newest first)
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      local kept=0
      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( kept < KEEP_LATEST )); then
          (( kept++ ))
        else
          delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        fi
      done
    done
  fi

  # Apply max-total-size policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    # Calculate total size of artifacts kept so far
    local total_kept_size=0
    declare -a kept_artifacts=()

    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
        kept_artifacts+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      fi
    done

    # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
    if (( total_kept_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${kept_artifacts[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( total_kept_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
          break
        fi
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size - artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      done
    fi
  fi

  # Generate output
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))

    if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

main "$@"

parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"

  # Determine which artifacts to delete
  declare -A delete_decision  # maps artifact name to KEEP or DELETE
  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    delete_decision["$artifact"]="KEEP"
  done

  # Apply max-age policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_date[$artifact]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
      fi
    done
  fi

  # Apply keep-latest-N policy
  if [[ -n "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    # Group by workflow
    declare -A workflow_artifacts
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local run_id="${artifacts_run[$artifact]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]+="$artifact "
    done

    # For each workflow, keep only latest N (by date)
    for run_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
      local artifacts_str="${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]}"
      declare -a workflow_list=()
      declare -a sort_data=()

      for artifact in $artifacts_str; do
        workflow_list+=("$artifact")
        sort_data+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      done

      # Sort by date (newest first)
      local -a sorted=()
      while IFS= read -r line; do
        sorted+=("$line")
      done < <(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

      local kept=0
      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( kept < KEEP_LATEST )); then
          (( kept++ ))
        else
          delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        fi
      done
    done
  fi

  # Apply max-total-size policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    # Calculate total size of artifacts kept so far
    local total_kept_size=0
    declare -a kept_artifacts=()

    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
        kept_artifacts+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      fi
    done

    # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
    if (( total_kept_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      local IFS=$'\n'
      local -a sorted=($(sort <<< "${kept_artifacts[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo ""))
      unset IFS

      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( total_kept_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
          break
        fi
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size - artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      done
    fi
  fi

  # Generate output
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))

    if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

main "$@"

I see the issue! In the keep-latest logic, I'm not resetting `kept` when I go to a different workflow. Also, I'm not explicitly setting to KEEP the kept artifacts. The logic should be:
1. Initialize all artifacts as KEEP (done earlier)
2. When applying keep-latest policy, for each workflow that already has some artifacts marked KEEP, keep only the N latest ones and mark the rest as DELETE

But the issue is that I'm relying on the previous initialization to set all to KEEP, and then only marking ones as DELETE. However, if an artifact was previously marked as DELETE by max-age policy, I shouldn't un-delete it.

Actually, looking at the code, the keep-latest policy is overwriting previous decisions. The problem is that the workflow test is using only one workflow (all artifacts have the same run_id "run-1"), so the logic should be deleting artifact-1 and artifact-2 after keeping only the 2 latest.

Let me trace through the logic manually:
1. artifact_list = [artifact-1, artifact-2, artifact-3, artifact-4]
2. All initialized with delete_decision="KEEP"
3. workflow_artifacts["run-1"] = "artifact-1 artifact-2 artifact-3 artifact-4"
4. sort_data = [
   "2026-05-01|artifact-1",
   "2026-05-02|artifact-2",
   "2026-05-03|artifact-3",
   "2026-05-04|artifact-4"

   - entry = "2026-05-03|artifact-3", artifact = "artifact-3", kept=1 < KEEP_LATEST=2, so kept=2
   - entry = "2026-05-02|artifact-2", artifact = "artifact-2", kept=2 < KEEP_LATEST=2 is false, so DELETE
   - entry = "2026-05-01|artifact-1", artifact = "artifact-1", kept=2 < KEEP_LATEST=2 is false, so DELETE

The logic appears sound here. The problem might be that KEEP_LATEST isn't being set properly in the configuration, or there's an issue with how the workflow grouping is happening before the sorting step.

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Artifact cleanup script: applies retention policies to artifact metadata
# and generates a deletion plan with summary

set -uo pipefail

DRY_RUN=false
MAX_AGE_DAYS=""
MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=""
KEEP_LATEST=""
INPUT_FILE=""
TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)

usage() {
  cat << 'EOF'
Usage: artifact-cleanup.sh [options]

Options:
  --input FILE              Path to artifact CSV file (required)
  --dry-run                 Show what would be deleted without deleting
  --max-age DAYS            Delete artifacts older than N days
  --max-total-size BYTES    Delete oldest artifacts if total size exceeds limit
  --keep-latest N           Keep only N latest artifacts per workflow
  --help                    Display this help message

Examples:
  artifact-cleanup.sh --input artifacts.csv --dry-run --max-age 30

CSV Format:
  name,size_bytes,creation_date,workflow_run_id
  artifact-1,1000,2026-05-01,run-1
EOF
}

parse_args() {
  while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
      --input)
        INPUT_FILE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --dry-run)
        DRY_RUN=true
        shift
        ;;
      --max-age)
        MAX_AGE_DAYS="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --max-total-size)
        MAX_TOTAL_SIZE="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --keep-latest)
        KEEP_LATEST="$2"
        shift 2
        ;;
      --help)
        usage
        exit 0
        ;;
      *)
        echo "Error: Unknown option: $1" >&2
        usage >&2
        exit 1
        ;;
    esac
  done
}

validate_input() {
  if [[ -z "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --input file is required" >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$INPUT_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: Input file not found: $INPUT_FILE" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
}

days_since() {
  local date1="$1"
  local date2="$2"

  local epoch1 epoch2
  epoch1=$(date -d "$date1" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  epoch2=$(date -d "$date2" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  if [[ "$epoch1" == "0" ]] || [[ "$epoch2" == "0" ]]; then
    echo "999999"
    return
  fi

  echo $(( (epoch1 - epoch2) / 86400 ))
}

main() {
  parse_args "$@"
  validate_input

  # Read all artifacts into memory
  declare -A artifacts_size
  declare -A artifacts_date
  declare -A artifacts_run
  declare -a artifact_list=()

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"

  # Determine which artifacts to delete
  declare -A delete_decision  # maps artifact name to KEEP or DELETE
  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    delete_decision["$artifact"]="KEEP"
  done

  # Apply max-age policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_date[$artifact]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
      fi
    done
  fi

  # Apply keep-latest-N policy
  if [[ -n "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    # Group by workflow
    declare -A workflow_artifacts
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local run_id="${artifacts_run[$artifact]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]+="$artifact "
    done

    # For each workflow, keep only latest N (by date)
    for run_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
      local artifacts_str="${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]}"
      declare -a workflow_list=()
      declare -a sort_data=()

      for artifact in $artifacts_str; do
        workflow_list+=("$artifact")
        sort_data+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      done

      # Sort by date (newest first)
      local -a sorted=()
      while IFS= read -r line; do
        sorted+=("$line")
      done < <(sort -r <<< "${sort_data[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

      local kept=0
      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( kept < KEEP_LATEST )); then
          (( kept++ ))
        else
          delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        fi
      done
    done
  fi

  # Apply max-total-size policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    # Calculate total size of artifacts kept so far
    local total_kept_size=0
    declare -a kept_artifacts=()

    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
        kept_artifacts+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      fi
    done

    # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
    if (( total_kept_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      local -a sorted=()
      while IFS= read -r line; do
        [[ -n "$line" ]] && sorted+=("$line")
      done < <(sort <<< "${kept_artifacts[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( total_kept_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
          break
        fi
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size - artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      done
    fi
  fi

  # Generate output
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))

    if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

main "$@"

  # Load CSV (skip header)
  local line_num=0
  while IFS=',' read -r name size_bytes creation_date workflow_run_id; do
    (( line_num++ ))
    [[ $line_num -eq 1 ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$name" ]] && continue

    artifacts_size["$name"]="$size_bytes"
    artifacts_date["$name"]="$creation_date"
    artifacts_run["$name"]="$workflow_run_id"
    artifact_list+=("$name")
  done < "$INPUT_FILE"

  # Determine which artifacts to delete
  declare -A delete_decision  # maps artifact name to KEEP or DELETE
  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    delete_decision["$artifact"]="KEEP"
  done

  # Apply max-age policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_AGE_DAYS" ]]; then
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local age_days
      age_days=$(days_since "$TODAY" "${artifacts_date[$artifact]}")
      if (( age_days > MAX_AGE_DAYS )); then
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
      fi
    done
  fi

  # Apply keep-latest-N policy
  if [[ -n "$KEEP_LATEST" ]]; then
    # Group by workflow
    declare -A workflow_artifacts
    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      local run_id="${artifacts_run[$artifact]}"
      if [[ -z "${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]:-}" ]]; then
        workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]=""
      fi
      workflow_artifacts["$run_id"]+="$artifact "
    done

    # For each workflow, keep only latest N (by date)
    for run_id in "${!workflow_artifacts[@]}"; do
      local artifacts_str="${workflow_artifacts[$run_id]}"
      declare -a workflow_list=()
      declare -a sort_data=()

      for artifact in $artifacts_str; do
        workflow_list+=("$artifact")
        sort_data+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      done

      # Sort by date (newest first)
      local -a sorted=()
      while IFS= read -r line; do
        [[ -n "$line" ]] && sorted+=("$line")
      done < <(printf '%s\n' "${sort_data[@]}" | sort -r)

      local kept=0
      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( kept < KEEP_LATEST )); then
          (( kept++ ))
        else
          delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        fi
      done
    done
  fi

  # Apply max-total-size policy
  if [[ -n "$MAX_TOTAL_SIZE" ]]; then
    # Calculate total size of artifacts kept so far
    local total_kept_size=0
    declare -a kept_artifacts=()

    for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
      if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "KEEP" ]]; then
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
        kept_artifacts+=("${artifacts_date[$artifact]}|$artifact")
      fi
    done

    # If over limit, mark oldest for deletion
    if (( total_kept_size > MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
      local -a sorted=()
      while IFS= read -r line; do
        [[ -n "$line" ]] && sorted+=("$line")
      done < <(sort <<< "${kept_artifacts[*]}" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

      for entry in "${sorted[@]}"; do
        [[ -z "$entry" ]] && continue
        local artifact="${entry#*|}"
        if (( total_kept_size <= MAX_TOTAL_SIZE )); then
          break
        fi
        delete_decision["$artifact"]="DELETE"
        total_kept_size=$((total_kept_size - artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      done
    fi
  fi

  # Generate output
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "=== DRY RUN MODE ==="
    echo ""
  fi

  echo "=== ARTIFACT CLEANUP PLAN ==="
  echo ""

  local total_artifacts=0
  local deleted_count=0
  local retained_count=0
  local deleted_size=0

  for artifact in "${artifact_list[@]}"; do
    (( total_artifacts++ ))

    if [[ "${delete_decision[$artifact]}" == "DELETE" ]]; then
      (( deleted_count++ ))
      deleted_size=$((deleted_size + artifacts_size[$artifact]))
      echo "DELETE: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    else
      (( retained_count++ ))
      echo "RETAIN: $artifact (size: ${artifacts_size[$artifact]} bytes, date: ${artifacts_date[$artifact]})"
    fi
  done

  echo ""
  echo "=== SUMMARY ==="
  echo "Total artifacts: $total_artifacts"
  echo "Artifacts to retain: $retained_count"
  echo "Artifacts to delete: $deleted_count"
  echo "Total space reclaimed: $deleted_size bytes"
  echo ""

  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
    echo "This is a dry-run. No artifacts were deleted."
  fi
}

main "$@"
